_publications._publicationTitle: COMT Val(158)Met Polymorphism Is Associated with Verbal Working Memory in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: IQ ( p  = 0.007) and working memory assessed by the backward digit-span task ( p  = 0.020) were directly associated with lower arithmetic performance
resourceName: Wechsler Adult and Children Intelligence Scales
details: IQ scores were predictive of lower arithmetic performance (p = 0.007) in NF1 patients, with moderate sensitivity (83%) and specificity (75%) for individual classification
